scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const d=p.join(__dirname,'dist','db');fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(p.join(__dirname,'db','schema.sql'),p.join(d,'schema.sql'));const ad=p.join(__dirname,'dist','admin');fs.mkdirSync(ad,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(p.join(__dirname,'admin','index.html'),p.join(ad,'index.html'));console.log('Copied schema.sql and admin/index.html to dist/')"
